title: Narrative Profile — Craft Targets
description: Profile overlay schema constraining unit.craft_targets for the narrative profile. Craft targets are prescriptive authorial intent — values are goals, not inferred claims. The interpreted_value wrapper MUST NOT be used.

tension.description: Target narrative tension level (0.0 = lowest, 1.0 = maximum).

pacing.description: Target pacing mode for this unit.
